text:
Comment on attachment 198236
chrome-gnome-shell.diff

+GH_ACCOUNT=     Gnome
+USE_GNOME=      pygobject3
+USE_GITHUB=     yes

USE_GITHUB goes before GH_ACCOUNT

Also shouldn't need 
.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
As you are not using .if statements pertaining to port options
